FAQ.question1: Does Véritas work for any business area?
FAQ.answer1: Yes. Véritas is designed to support decisions in any context — operational, strategic, financial, or product-related. The platform adapts to your scenario, not the other way around.
FAQ.question2: Do I need technical knowledge to use it?
FAQ.answer2: No. Véritas is built to be accessible to anyone, regardless of technical background. The interface is simple and the decision process is guided step by step.
FAQ.question3: Is my data safe on the platform?
FAQ.answer3: Yes. All information entered in Véritas is stored securely and never shared with third parties. You have full control over your data.
FAQ.question4: Can I use Véritas as a team?
FAQ.answer4: Yes. Véritas supports multiple users within the same organization, with access control and shared decision history.
FAQ.answer5: Yes, we are in early stage. This means you can try the platform now, contribute feedback, and help shape the product from the start.
